_comment: Authored by Claude. Daemon reads this on every loop. Update whenever thesis changes — daemon picks up within one tick. No numeric cap on alert count — every alert must be actively useful NOW (would you act on it with real money if it fires in the next hour?). Stale = remove. Signal-only / REMOTE / low-probability = remove.
pruned_by: 12:45 UTC heartbeat — 0 unconsumed events. Broker $1000/0 pos matches. level_alerts.note: buy AUDUSD 0.707 support on Iran-escalation spike — live 12:42 UTC 0.71468 (-9.7p vs 11:21 0.71565, 74.7p above zone; drift lower continuing but nowhere near trigger). Indefinite ceasefire extension narrative intact (Reuters/NYT/DetNews/AJ 4-source verified). Spike to 0.707 requires fresh Hormuz strike escalation (ongoing — Apr 22 07:55 IRGC gunboat fire on container ship per ksat/nbcnews/armyrecognition, but no casualties so weak driver) OR formal Iran walkout. BTC +3.28% today signals risk-ON continuing which WEAKENS AUDUSD-spike-to-0.707 thesis (risk-on = AUD bid not sold). Wait for rejection wick on 0.707 touch + risk-off confirmation; skip naked breaks. SL 0.703, TP 0.7187 on confirmation.
level_alerts.proximity: 74.7p above 0.707 buy zone (live 12:42 UTC 0.71468 bid). Drifted -9.7p vs 11:21. BTC+3.28% risk-on contradicts spike-to-support thesis.

level_alerts.note: sell USDJPY 160.00 intervention red-line fade — live 12:42 UTC 159.312 (+9p vs 11:21 159.214, 68.8p below 160). Day hi 159.455 intact from earlier session. Indefinite extension verified; USD bid flat-to-soft. Setup structurally valid (Japan intervened 159.23 Jan 2026, MoF Katayama G7 'high urgency', BoJ Apr 27-28 hold priced). Counterfactual hit_rate 100% at 1h+4h (1 fire only, thin sample). Short ONLY on rejection wick at 160.00 + verbal-intervention/MoF tweet confirm; skip naked breaks. SL 160.50, TP 158.50 R:R ~3:1.
level_alerts.proximity: 68.8p below 160.00 intervention red line (live 12:42 UTC 159.312 bid). Day range 159.101-159.455.

level_alerts.note: MODIFIED 12:45 UTC — buy GOLD 4775 breakout. Live 12:42 UTC 4747.16 (-5.5p vs 11:21, +0.58% day, 27.84p below trigger, day range 4715.44-4772.24). Day hi 4772.24 reject holding (price drifted back into middle of range, not re-testing top). **BTC +3.28% (day low 75296 → 78204) is MATERIAL RISK-ON pressure against gold safehaven bias** — pure risk-on = gold typically sells down to 4715. Still, gold holding +0.58% day vs BTC rally suggests residual Hormuz-hedge bid. Catalyst-conditional thesis: 4775 break needs stronger catalyst (US casualty, large tanker sinking, Iran formal walkout). Conservative: wait for M15 close >4775 + volume + no rejection wick. Aggressive: anticipation LIMIT buy at 4735-4740 with SL 4705, TP 4775 retest. SL 4730, TP1 4810, TP2 4850. Conv 3 (1 test 1 reject; BTC risk-on weakens thesis further). SKIP if BTC continues ripping AND USD pairs bid AND no fresh Hormuz incident.
level_alerts.proximity: 27.84p below 4775 buy trigger (live 12:42 UTC 4747.16 bid). Price retreated -5.5p from prior ref back into mid-range; day hi 4772.24 reject intact.
